text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco

Log:
  Add patches for CVE-2016-2334 and CVE-2016-2335.

  While here, use PORTREVISION?= instead of PORTREVISION= to avoid needlessly
  bumping PORTREVISION in archivers/p7zip-codec-rar.
